meta.note: Single source of truth for the genealogy graph. Claude Code must render from this file verbatim and must NOT invent nodes, edges, or hover texts. All node detail-page content comes from the weekly notes files listed in source_file.

stages.label_zh: 一般理论与跨国长时段
stages.period_en: no single period; theory band + global panels
stages.period_zh: 无单一时期：理论带与全球面板
约公元前4000–前500年（苏美尔、埃及、秘鲁）

lanes.desc_en: Geography, crops, writing, surveying, communication infrastructure: what makes populations and resources visible, appropriable, governable.
lanes.desc_zh: 地理、作物、书写、测绘、通信基础设施：什么使人口与资源变得可见、可占用、可治理。

lanes.desc_en: Violence monopolization, taxation, war finance, agency control: the core of this course.
lanes.desc_zh: 暴力垄断、税收、战争融资、代理控制：本课程的主干。

lanes.desc_en: Parliaments, assemblies, bureaucracies, elite networks, schools, village institutions: how populations are organized and represented.
lanes.desc_zh: 议会、集会、官僚制、精英网络、学校、村社制度：人口如何被组织与代表。

lanes.desc_en: Why rule is not naked violence: religious authority, investiture, compliance beliefs. Sparse in this course but not empty; normative-legitimacy nodes from other courses will be added later.
lanes.desc_zh: 统治为何不是赤裸暴力：宗教权威、叙任权、合规信念。本课程中稀疏但非空白；规范合法性节点将由其他课程后续填入。

method.note_en: Each method buys a different kind of credibility and pays a different price: formal models buy logical transparency at the cost of realism; comparative history buys mechanism thickness at the cost of identification; RDD buys local internal validity at the cost of external validity (LATE); large-N panels and grids buy scope at the cost of measurement error; new indices buy measurement innovation at the cost of construct-validity risk. This is NOT a low-to-high progression.
method.note_zh: 每种方法购买不同类型的可信度并支付不同代价：形式模型以现实性换逻辑透明；比较历史以识别换机制厚度；RDD 以外部效度（LATE）换局部内部效度；大N面板与网格以测量误差换覆盖范围；新指数以构念效度风险换测量创新。这不是从低级到高级的进步序列。

legitimacy.note_en: Distinguish normative legitimacy (popular sovereignty, representation, constitutionalism — mostly from other courses) from functional compliance/cooperation (quasi-voluntary compliance, credible commitment, local collective action — present in this course in a 'low-spec' form). Gehlbach is a counter-thesis: fiscal-contract-like outcomes without any voluntary compliance.
legitimacy.note_zh: 区分规范合法性（人民主权、代表制、宪政——主要来自其他课程）与功能性服从/合作（准自愿合规、可信承诺、地方集体行动——本课程以'低配版本'呈现）。Gehlbach 是反命题：没有任何自愿合规也能产生类财政契约的结果。

tilly.note_en: Highlights how each work relates to the bellicist paradigm. Note that some works respond to a strawman Tilly; hover texts flag this where the class discussed it.
tilly.note_zh: 高亮各文献与战争制造国家范式的关系。部分文献回应的是稻草人 Tilly，课堂讨论涉及处在悬停文案中标注。

problem_chain.label_zh: 剩余不等于国家：可榨取性
problem_chain.desc_en: What material conditions make populations and resources controllable, taxable, unable to exit?
problem_chain.desc_zh: 什么物质条件使人口与资源可控制、可征收、不可逃逸？

problem_chain.label_en: Appropriability ≠ state formation: coercion & war pressure
problem_chain.label_zh: 可榨取性不等于国家形成：强制与战争压力
problem_chain.desc_en: Why do violence specialists shift from plunder to stable rule? How do war, threat, and finance structure state-building incentives?
problem_chain.desc_zh: 暴力组织为何从掠夺转向稳定统治？战争、威胁与融资结构如何改变国家建设激励？

problem_chain.label_en: Wanting revenue ≠ getting revenue: agency & monitoring
problem_chain.label_zh: 有汲取目标不等于能汲取：代理与监控
problem_chain.desc_en: Rulers extract through intermediaries. Tax farming vs bureaucracy, legibility parameter q, scale, sectoral taxability.
problem_chain.desc_zh: 统治者隔着中间人汲取。包税制 vs 科层制、可辨识性参数 q、规模、部门可税性。

problem_chain.label_zh: 能汲取不等于能持续：承诺、合规与社会合作
problem_chain.desc_en: Pure coercion is expensive. Durable fiscal capacity requires credible commitment and some form of cooperation from the governed.
problem_chain.desc_zh: 纯强制太贵。长期财政能力依赖可信承诺与被治理者某种形式的合作。

problem_chain.label_zh: 国家能力作为原因：长期后果
problem_chain.desc_en: Historical state capacity as treatment: persistence, dynamics, and the methodological audit of that entire genre.
problem_chain.desc_zh: 历史国家能力作为处理变量：持久性、动态后果，以及对整个文类的方法论体检。

nodes.citation_en: Max Weber, monopoly of legitimate violence; bureaucracy as ideal type.
nodes.citation_zh: 马克斯·韦伯：合法暴力垄断的国家定义；官僚制理想型。
nodes.tooltip_en: Conceptual anchor for the whole course: the state as the organization monopolizing legitimate violence over a territory. Not an assigned reading; no detail page.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 全课概念锚点：国家是在领土内垄断合法暴力的组织。非指定阅读，无详情页。

nodes.citation_en: Robert L. Carneiro (1970), "A Theory of the Origin of the State," Science.
nodes.citation_zh: 卡内罗（1970）《国家起源的一种理论》，Science。
nodes.tooltip_en: Environmental circumscription + population pressure + warfare: defeated groups that cannot exit are incorporated. Method of difference across circumscribed vs open regions.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 环境限制+人口压力+战争：无法逃逸的战败者被吸纳。受限与开放区域的差异法比较。

nodes.citation_en: Mancur Olson (1993), "Dictatorship, Democracy, and Development," APSR.
nodes.citation_zh: 奥尔森（1993）《专制、民主与发展》，APSR。
nodes.tooltip_en: Roving vs stationary bandit: an encompassing interest gives the settled predator incentives to limit extraction and provide order. Historical examples are illustrative, selectively chosen — the course's benchmark for 'illustration ≠ test'.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 流寇 vs 坐寇：涵盖性利益使定居掠夺者有激励节制汲取并提供秩序。历史例证是选择性的说明而非检验——全课'illustration ≠ test'的基准案例。

nodes.citation_en: James C. Scott (2017), Against the Grain: A Deep History of the Earliest States, chs. 4–5.
nodes.citation_zh: 斯科特（2017）《作茧自缚：早期国家的深层历史》第4–5章。
nodes.tooltip_en: Grain legibility (above ground, simultaneously ripening, divisible, storable) plus coerced sedentism and bondage as the agro-ecological basis of early states. Functionalist inference is its criticized soft spot.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 谷物可读性（地上生长、同时成熟、可分割储存）加上强制定居与人身束缚，构成早期国家的农业生态基础。功能主义推断是其被批评的软肋。

nodes.citation_en: Ernesto Dal Bó, Pablo Hernández-Lagos & Sebastián Mazzuca (2022), "The Paradox of Civilization: Preinstitutional Sources of Security and Prosperity."
nodes.citation_zh: 达尔博等（2022）《文明的悖论：安全与繁荣的前制度根源》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Formalizes the security–prosperity interaction: producing surplus attracts predators, so civilization requires jointly solving defense and production. Qualitative illustrations on Sumer and Egypt only — internal validity bought at the price of external testing.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 形式化安全—繁荣的互动：生产剩余招致掠夺者，文明要求同时解决防御与生产。仅以苏美尔、埃及作定性说明——用外部检验的缺席换取内部效度。

nodes.citation_en: Robert C. Allen (1997), "Agriculture and the Origins of the State in Ancient Egypt."
nodes.citation_zh: 艾伦（1997）《农业与古埃及国家的起源》。
nodes.tooltip_en: A puzzle-driven template question: why did Egypt unify within ~1,000 years of adopting agriculture while the Near East lagged millennia? Nile geography made peasants unable to exit, making the population appropriable.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 谜题式提问的模板：为何埃及采纳农业后约千年即统一而近东滞后数千年？尼罗河地理使农民无法逃逸，人口因此可被占用。

nodes.citation_en: Peter Kurrild-Klitgaard & Gert T. Svendsen (2003), "Rational Bandits: Plunder, Public Goods, and the Vikings," Public Choice.
nodes.citation_zh: 库里尔德-克利特高、斯文森（2003）《理性盗匪：掠夺、公共物品与维京人》，Public Choice。
nodes.tooltip_en: The Viking transition from raiding to settlement and regular taxation as a historical illustration of Olson's roving-to-stationary bandit logic.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 维京人从劫掠到定居征税的转变，作为奥尔森流寇—坐寇逻辑的历史例证。

nodes.citation_en: Robert C. Allen, Mattia C. Bertazzini & Leander Heldring (2023), "The Economic Origins of Government," AER 113(10).
nodes.citation_zh: 艾伦、贝尔塔齐尼、赫尔德林（2023）《政府的经济起源》，AER。
nodes.tooltip_en: Euphrates river shifts as a natural experiment on ancient state formation: grid-cell archaeological panel adjudicating between coercion-based and cooperation-based theories of why states form.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 幼发拉底河改道作为古代国家形成的自然实验：网格化考古面板，在强制论与合作论之间做裁决。

nodes.citation_en: Joram Mayshar, Omer Moav & Luigi Pascali (2022), "The Origin of the State: Land Productivity or Appropriability?", JPE.
nodes.citation_zh: 梅沙尔、莫阿夫、帕斯卡利（2022）《国家的起源：土地生产力还是可占用性？》，JPE。
nodes.tooltip_en: It is not surplus but appropriability that breeds hierarchy: cereals (visible, storable, confiscable) vs tubers. Operationalizes Scott-style legibility into a testable crop-suitability variable.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 催生等级的不是剩余而是可占用性：谷物（可见、可储、可没收）对块茎。把斯科特式可读性操作化为可检验的作物适宜性变量。

nodes.citation_en: Melissa Dell, Nathan Lane & Pablo Querubín (2018), "The Historical State, Local Collective Action, and Economic Development in Vietnam," Econometrica 86(6).
nodes.citation_zh: 戴尔、莱恩、克鲁宾（2018）《历史国家、地方集体行动与越南的经济发展》，Econometrica。
nodes.tooltip_en: Geographic RDD on a 1698 Dai Viet administrative boundary: longer exposure to a village-based bureaucratic state crowds in local collective action and yields better development today. The course's target state for credible causal identification — at the LATE price of external validity.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 1698年大越行政边界的地理断点回归：更长的村社官僚国家暴露挤入地方集体行动，带来更好的当代发展。全课因果识别的目标状态——代价是外部效度（LATE）。

nodes.citation_en: Jacob Gerner Hariri (2012), "The Autocratic Legacy of Early Statehood," APSR 106(3).
nodes.citation_zh: 哈里里（2012）《早期国家形成的专制遗产》，APSR。
nodes.tooltip_en: Early statehood predicts contemporary autocracy: indigenous state institutions resisted European institutional transplantation. Persistence with a negative sign — the mirror image of Dell.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 早期国家性预测当代威权：本土国家制度抵御了欧洲制度移植。符号为负的持久性——Dell 的镜像。

nodes.citation_en: Leticia Arroyo Abad & Noel Maurer (2021), "History Never Really Says Goodbye: A Critical Review of the Persistence Literature," JHPE 1.
nodes.citation_zh: 阿罗约·阿巴德、毛勒（2021）《历史从未真正说再见：持续性文献的批判性综述》，JHPE。
nodes.tooltip_en: The methodological audit of the persistence genre: compression of history, spatial autocorrelation, mechanism black boxes, apples-to-oranges comparisons. Render as a meta node attached to segment E.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 对持久性文类的方法论体检：历史压缩、空间自相关、机制黑箱、'苹果比橘子'。作为附着于 E 段的元方法节点渲染。

nodes.citation_en: Oana Borcan, Ola Olsson & Louis Putterman (2018), "State History and Economic Development: Evidence from Six Millennia," J. Econ. Growth.
nodes.citation_zh: 博尔灿、奥尔松、普特曼（2018）《国家历史与经济发展：来自六千年的证据》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Extends the state-history index back to 3500 BCE and finds an inverted-U: both too little and too much accumulated statehood predict worse development today.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 将国家历史指数回溯至公元前3500年，发现倒U关系：国家历史太短与太长都预测更差的当代发展。

nodes.citation_en: Didac Queralt (2022), Pawned States: State Building in the Era of International Finance, chs. 1, 7.
nodes.citation_zh: 克拉尔特（2022）《被典当的国家：国际金融时代的国家建设》第1、7章。
nodes.tooltip_en: War financed by taxes builds capacity; war financed by cheap external credit (1816–1913) mortgages sovereignty and bypasses institution building. Removes a hidden premise of the Tilly mechanism.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 以税养战建设能力；以廉价外债养战（1816–1913）则典当主权、绕过制度建设。抽掉了 Tilly 机制的一个隐含前提。

nodes.citation_en: Nicola Gennaioli & Hans-Joachim Voth (2015), "State Capacity and Military Conflict," REStud.
nodes.citation_zh: 根纳奥利、沃斯（2015）《国家能力与军事冲突》，REStud。
nodes.tooltip_en: War builds states only under conditions: after the Military Revolution made money decisive, and where domestic cohesion made revenue investments worthwhile. The bellicist thesis rewritten with interaction terms.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 战争只在特定条件下造就国家：军事革命使金钱决定胜负之后，且国内凝聚使财政投资值得。带交互项重写的战争国家说。

nodes.citation_en: Lars-Erik Cederman, Paola Galano Toro, Luc Girardin & Guy Schvitz (2023), "War Did Make States: Revisiting the Bellicist Paradigm in Early Modern Europe."
nodes.citation_zh: 塞德曼等（2023）《战争确实造就了国家：重访早期现代欧洲的战争国家范式》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Territorial panel 1490–1790 (Herfindahl concentration, state death, dyadic gains): cumulative war-fueled territorial feedback supports the bellicist paradigm against its revisionist critics.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 1490–1790领土面板（赫芬达尔集中度、国家消亡、二元组得失）：战争驱动的累积领土反馈支持战争国家说，回应修正派批评。

nodes.citation_en: Charles Tilly (1992), Coercion, Capital, and European States, AD 990–1992, chs. 2–3.
nodes.tooltip_en: War made states and vice versa; coercion-intensive, capital-intensive, and capitalized-coercion paths. The paradigm anchor most of the course argues with — sometimes with the real Tilly, sometimes a strawman.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 战争造就国家，国家亦造就战争；强制密集、资本密集与资本化强制三条路径。全课与之对话的范式锚点——有时是真 Tilly，有时是稻草人。

nodes.citation_en: Scott F. Abramson (2017), "The Economic Origins of the Territorial State," IO 71.
nodes.citation_zh: 艾布拉姆森（2017）《领土国家的经济起源》，IO。
nodes.tooltip_en: Gridded panel of European polities 1100–1790: small states persisted where urban commercial wealth was high; war pressure explains less than economic geography. Its shapefiles and coding standard became infrastructure reused by later work.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 1100–1790欧洲政体网格面板：城市商业财富高处小国长存；战争压力的解释力不敌经济地理。其 shapefile 与编码标准成为后续研究复用的数据基础设施。

nodes.citation_en: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Mark Koyama, Youhong Lin & Tuan-Hwee Sng (2023), "The Fractured-Land Hypothesis," QJE 138(2).
nodes.citation_zh: 费尔南德斯-比利亚韦尔德、小山、林友宏、孙端辉（2023）《碎裂土地假说》，QJE。
nodes.tooltip_en: Dynamic simulation on gridded geography: fractured terrain sustains European fragmentation, open core sustains Chinese unification. Geography, not war intensity, drives the macro divergence of state systems.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 网格地理上的动态模拟：碎裂地形维持欧洲分裂，开阔核心维持中国统一。驱动国家体系宏观分流的是地理而非战争烈度。

nodes.citation_en: Avidit Acharya & Alexander Lee (2023), The Cartel System of States: An Economic Theory of International Politics.
nodes.citation_zh: 阿查里亚、李（2023）《国家的卡特尔体系：国际政治的经济学理论》。
nodes.tooltip_en: The state system as a cartel: incumbent rulers collude to fix borders and exclude entrants from the market for governance. Shifts the unit of theory from the single state to the system.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 国家体系作为卡特尔：在位统治者共谋固定边界、把新进入者排除出治理市场。理论单元从单个国家转向体系。

nodes.citation_en: Noah L. Nathan (2023), The Scarce State: Inequality and Political Power in the Hinterland.
nodes.citation_zh: 内森（2023）《稀缺的国家：边陲地区的不平等与政治权力》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Where the state is scarce (northern Ghana), its rare interventions have outsized, inequality-generating effects on local power. State absence is itself a treatment.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 在国家稀缺之处（加纳北部），其罕见的介入对地方权力产生放大的、制造不平等的效应。国家的缺席本身是一种处理。

nodes.citation_en: Edgar Kiser (1994), "Markets and Hierarchies in Early Modern Tax Systems: A Principal-Agent Analysis."
nodes.citation_zh: 凯泽（1994）《早期现代税收体系中的市场与科层：一种委托-代理分析》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Tax farming vs state administration as a contract choice driven by monitoring capacity: low q → sell the extraction right (market); high q → salaried bureaucracy (hierarchy). Cross-disciplinary arbitrage from contract theory into historical sociology.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 包税制 vs 国家行政作为由监控能力驱动的合约选择：低 q → 出售征税权（市场）；高 q → 领薪官僚（科层）。从合约理论到历史社会学的跨学科套利。

nodes.citation_en: Tuan-Hwee Sng (2014), "Size and Dynastic Decline: The Principal-Agent Problem in Late Imperial China, 1700–1850."
nodes.citation_zh: 孙端辉（2014）《规模与王朝衰落：晚期中华帝国的委托-代理问题，1700–1850》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Geographic scale dilutes monitoring: agent extortion rises with distance, the rebellion threshold caps official taxes, and growth paradoxically erodes fiscal capacity. Class critique: the model rationalizes a known pattern (inductive in deductive clothing) and confounds size with institutional design.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 地理规模稀释监控：代理人勒索随距离上升，叛乱门槛压低官方税率，增长悖论式侵蚀财政能力。课堂批评：模型是对已知模式的归纳式合理化（披着演绎外衣），并混淆了规模与制度设计。

nodes.citation_en: David Stasavage (2020), The Decline and Rise of Democracy, chs. 3–4.
nodes.citation_zh: 斯塔萨维奇（2020）《民主的衰落与崛起》第3–4章。
nodes.tooltip_en: Weak states (rulers who could not see or measure) had to govern through councils — 'early democracy'; writing, surveying and bureaucratic technology raised q and enabled hierarchical rule. Opens the door to endogenizing legibility; evidence is illustrative, heavy reliance on the Murdock Atlas.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 弱国家（看不见、测不准的统治者）只能借助议事会治理——'早期民主'；书写、测量与官僚技术提高 q，使等级统治成为可能。打开了可辨识性内生化的大门；证据是说明性的，重度依赖 Murdock Atlas。

nodes.citation_en: Raúl Sánchez de la Sierra (2020), "On the Origins of the State: Stationary Bandits and Taxation in Eastern Congo," JPE 128(1).
nodes.citation_zh: 桑切斯·德拉谢拉（2020）《国家的起源：刚果东部的坐寇与征税》，JPE。
nodes.tooltip_en: Coltan (bulky, visible) vs gold (concealable) price shocks as exogenous variation in taxability: armed groups develop different state functions accordingly. Class caveats: 'state' never defined; not pristine state origins — a mechanism study, not an origins study.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 钶钽矿（笨重可见）与黄金（易藏匿）的价格冲击作为可税性的外生变异：武装团体据此发展不同国家功能。课堂保留意见：全文未定义'国家'；亦非原生国家起源——是机制研究而非起源研究。

nodes.citation_en: Margaret Levi (1988), Of Rule and Revenue, chs. 2–3 (and 5).
nodes.citation_zh: 列维（1988）《统治与岁入》第2–3章（及第5章）。
nodes.tooltip_en: The ruler as revenue maximizer constrained by bargaining power, transaction costs, and discount rates; quasi-voluntary compliance is where the demand for consent first grows out of the extraction logic itself. Class verdict: agenda-setting brilliance, the opposite of parsimony.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 统治者作为受议价能力、交易成本、贴现率约束的收入最大化者；准自愿合规是'对同意的需求'第一次从汲取逻辑内部生长出来之处。课堂评价：议程设定的典范，简约性的反面。

nodes.citation_en: Douglass C. North & Barry R. Weingast (1989), "Constitutions and Commitment," J. Econ. Hist.
nodes.citation_zh: 诺思、温加斯特（1989）《宪法与承诺》。
nodes.tooltip_en: Institutional constraints (penalty P) after the Glorious Revolution made royal commitments credible, unlocking public credit. Class critiques: circularity (who designs the designer?), no pre-1688 quantitative baseline, and the evidence proves a different proposition than the stated argument.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 光荣革命后的制度约束（惩罚 P）使王室承诺可信，释放公共信贷。课堂批评：循环论证（谁设计了设计者？）、缺乏1688年前的量化基线、证据证明的命题与其宣称的论点并不相同。

nodes.citation_en: David Stasavage (2011), States of Credit: Size, Power, and the Development of European Polities, chs. 1–3.
nodes.citation_zh: 斯塔萨维奇（2011）《信用的国家：规模、权力与欧洲政体的发展》第1–3章。
nodes.tooltip_en: Endogenizes P = f(alignment of parliament with creditors, monitoring feasibility): small merchant-oligarchy city-states borrowed cheapest. Explicitly not a story about democracy — institutions need substance, not form.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 将 P 内生化为 P = f(议会与债权人的利益一致性, 监控可行性)：小型商人寡头城市国家借贷最廉价。明确不是关于民主的论述——制度需要实质而非形式。

nodes.citation_en: Scott Gehlbach (2008), Representation through Taxation, chs. 1, 3.
nodes.citation_zh: 盖尔巴赫（2008）《通过税收的代表》第1、3章。
nodes.tooltip_en: No voluntary compliance anywhere: postcommunist governments feed the sectors whose production is naturally legible and taxable (the vodka monopoly). Something that looks like a fiscal contract emerges from pure taxability — the counter-thesis to Levi.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 全程没有自愿合规：后共产政府喂养生产天然可辨识、可征税的部门（伏特加垄断）。看似财政契约的结果从纯粹可税性中产生——对列维的反命题。

nodes.citation_en: Timothy Besley & Torsten Persson (2011), Pillars of Prosperity, chs. 1–2.
nodes.citation_zh: 贝斯利、佩尔森（2011）《繁荣的支柱》第1–2章。
nodes.tooltip_en: Development clusters as a covariation puzzle: fiscal capacity, legal capacity, low violence and income co-move. Capacity is a forward-looking investment; war works as a common-interest shock only under cohesive institutions.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 发展集群作为共变谜题：财政能力、法律能力、低暴力与高收入系统性同现。能力是前瞻性投资；战争只有在凝聚性制度下才作为共同利益冲击起作用。

nodes.citation_en: Agustina S. Paglayan (2024), Raised to Obey: The Rise and Spread of Mass Education, chs. 1, 3.
nodes.citation_zh: 帕格拉扬（2024）《养育以服从：大众教育的兴起与传播》第1、3章。
nodes.tooltip_en: Mass primary education spread not to build human capital or from democratization, but as a state response to internal disorder: schools to manufacture obedient, rule-following subjects. The state investing directly in the belief layer.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 大众初等教育的扩散并非为了人力资本、也非民主化的产物，而是国家对内部失序的回应：学校用以生产服从守规的臣民。国家对信念层的直接投资。

nodes.citation_en: Yuhua Wang (2022), "Blood is Thicker Than Water: Elite Kinship Networks and State Building in Imperial China," APSR 116(3).
nodes.citation_zh: 王裕华（2022）《血浓于水：帝制中国的精英宗族网络与国家建设》，APSR。
nodes.tooltip_en: Song-dynasty elites whose kinship networks spanned regions supported state strengthening; locally concentrated kin networks opposed it. The social geography of elites, not just ruler incentives, decides state building.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 宋代宗族网络跨地域的精英支持国家强化；宗族本地集中的精英反对之。决定国家建设的不只是统治者激励，还有精英的社会地理。

nodes.citation_en: Pavithra Suryanarayan & Steven White (2021), "Slavery, Reconstruction, and Bureaucratic Capacity in the American South," APSR 115(2).
nodes.citation_zh: 苏里亚纳拉扬、怀特（2021）《奴隶制、重建与美国南方的官僚能力》，APSR。
nodes.tooltip_en: Southern elites deliberately hollowed out fiscal and bureaucratic capacity after Reconstruction to preserve racial status hierarchy: state weakness as an elite weapon, not a failure.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 重建后南方精英刻意掏空财政与官僚能力以维护种族身份等级：国家孱弱是精英的武器而非失败。

nodes.citation_en: Anna Grzymala-Busse (2023), Sacred Foundations: How the Medieval Church Drove State Formation in Europe, chs. 2–3.
nodes.citation_zh: 格日玛拉-布塞（2023）《神圣根基：中世纪教会如何推动欧洲国家形成》第2–3章。
nodes.tooltip_en: The medieval church as both rival (fragmenting empires) and template (chanceries, canon law, councils): Europe's state institutions were borrowed from the papacy before war competition mattered. Reuses Abramson's shapefiles — methodological infrastructure in action.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 中世纪教会既是竞争者（碎片化帝国）又是模板（文书署、教会法、会议制）：欧洲国家制度在战争竞争起作用之前就借自教廷。复用 Abramson 的 shapefile——数据基础设施复用的实例。

nodes.citation_en: Bruce Bueno de Mesquita & Ethan Bueno de Mesquita (2023), "From Investiture to Worms: European Development and the Rise of Political Authority," JOP 85(3).
nodes.citation_zh: 布尔诺·德·梅斯基塔父子（2023）《从叙任权之争到沃尔姆斯：欧洲发展与政治权威的兴起》，JOP。
nodes.tooltip_en: The Investiture Controversy formalized: bargaining between pope and secular rulers over who legitimates bishops reshaped political authority and urban development. Legitimation conflict itself as the engine — the course's most explicit justification-layer node.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 叙任权之争的形式化：教皇与世俗统治者围绕'谁授职主教'的议价重塑了政治权威与城市发展。合法性冲突本身作为引擎——本课最明确的证成层节点。

nodes.citation_en: Davide Cantoni, Jeremiah Dittmar & Noam Yuchtman (2018), "Religious Competition and Reallocation: The Political Economy of Secularization in the Protestant Reformation," QJE.
nodes.citation_zh: 坎托尼、迪特马尔、尤赫特曼（2018）《宗教竞争与资源再配置：新教改革中世俗化的政治经济学》，QJE。
nodes.tooltip_en: The Reformation as a shock to the religious economy: human capital, construction, and administrative talent reallocated from church to state. A change in the justification layer with measurable material consequences.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 宗教改革作为宗教经济的冲击：人力资本、建筑与行政人才从教会再配置到国家。证成层的变动带来可测量的物质后果。

nodes.citation_en: Chin-Hao Huang & David C. Kang (2022), "State Formation in Korea and Japan, 400–800 CE: Emulation and Learning, Not Bellicist Competition," IO 76.
nodes.citation_zh: 黄勤浩、康灿雄（2022）《公元400–800年朝鲜与日本的国家形成：模仿与学习，而非战争竞争》，IO。
nodes.tooltip_en: Korea and Japan built centralized states by emulating Tang institutions — Confucian bureaucracy, law codes, Buddhism — absent hegemonic war pressure. Ideas and prestige, not bellicist competition, in the East Asian sequence.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 朝鲜与日本在无霸权战争压力下通过模仿唐制——儒家官僚制、律令、佛教——建成集权国家。东亚序列中的驱动力是观念与声望，而非战争竞争。

nodes.citation_en: Michelle D'Arcy, Marina Nistotskaya & Ola Olsson (2024), "Cadasters and Economic Growth: A Long-Run Cross-Country Panel," JPE 132(11).
nodes.citation_zh: 达西、尼斯托茨卡娅、奥尔松（2024）《地籍登记与经济增长：长时段跨国面板》，JPE。
nodes.tooltip_en: Legibility made into an index: cadastral mapping × registration × coverage, tested channel by channel (transaction costs via WB registration data, taxation via UNU-WIDER, investment via WDI). Honestly reports the counterintuitive result that cadasters raised indirect, not property, taxes.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 把可读性做成指数：测绘×登记×覆盖，并逐机制检验（交易成本用世行登记数据、税收用UNU-WIDER、投资用WDI）。诚实报告了反直觉结果：地籍提高的是间接税而非财产税。

nodes.citation_en: Cédric Chambru, Emeric Henry & Benjamin Marx (2024), "The Dynamic Consequences of State Building: Evidence from the French Revolution," AER 114(11).
nodes.citation_zh: 尚布吕、亨利、马克思（2024）《国家建设的动态后果：来自法国大革命的证据》，AER。
nodes.tooltip_en: Quasi-random placement of new departmental capitals in 1790: state presence produced short-run costs and long-run development gains — consequences of state building unfold dynamically rather than persisting statically.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 1790年新省会的准随机选址：国家在场带来短期成本与长期发展收益——国家建设的后果是动态展开的，而非静态持久。

nodes.citation_en: Davide Cantoni, Cathrin Mohr & Matthias Weigand (2024), "The Rise of Fiscal Capacity: Administration and State Consolidation in the Holy Roman Empire," Econometrica 92(5).
nodes.citation_zh: 坎托尼、莫尔、魏甘德（2024）《财政能力的兴起：神圣罗马帝国的行政管理与国家整合》，Econometrica。
nodes.tooltip_en: Micro-history of fiscal capacity across 2,000+ HRE polities: administrators and administrative buildings track state consolidation; capacity investment observed at the finest grain in the course.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 神圣罗马帝国2000+政体的财政能力微观史：行政官与行政建筑追踪国家整合；本课中颗粒度最细的能力投资观察。

nodes.citation_en: Michael Albertus & Victor Gay (2025, forthcoming), "State-Building and Rebellion in the Run-Up to the French Revolution," APSR.
nodes.citation_zh: 阿尔贝图斯、盖伊（2025，即刊）《法国大革命前夕的国家建设与叛乱》，APSR。
nodes.tooltip_en: Expansion of the royal horse-post network (staggered DiD on 8,516 Nicolas-survey rebellions): state communication infrastructure itself triggered local rebellion. Penetration provokes resistance — the feedback loop extraction models assume away.
nodes.tooltip_zh: 王室驿站网的扩张（对Nicolas调查8516起叛乱的交错DiD）：国家通信基础设施本身触发地方叛乱。渗透激起抵抗——汲取模型假设掉的反馈回路。

edges.hover_en: Segment A shows what makes populations appropriable — legible grain, bounded valleys, confiscable crops. But conditions do not generate rulers: someone with a comparative advantage in violence must choose settlement over plunder. Olson answers with the encompassing interest of the stationary bandit.
edges.hover_zh: A段说明什么使人口可被占用——可读的谷物、封闭的河谷、可没收的作物。但条件不会自动生成统治者：拥有暴力比较优势的行动者必须选择定居而非流窜。奥尔森用坐寇的涵盖性利益回答这一激励问题。

edges.hover_en: The bandit model assumes the ruler taxes with his own hands. In reality extraction runs through tax farmers and clerks who see the revenue first. Wanting revenue ≠ getting revenue: the monitoring parameter q becomes the pivot of institutional choice.
edges.hover_zh: 坐寇模型假定统治者亲手征税。现实中汲取隔着包税人与胥吏，他们先于统治者看到收入。有汲取目标≠能汲取：监控参数 q 成为制度选择的枢纽。

edges.hover_en: Pure monitor-and-punish equilibria are expensive and fragile: Sng's rebellion threshold shows extraction hitting a wall. Durable fiscal capacity needs something cheaper than coercion — Levi's quasi-voluntary compliance is the demand for consent growing out of the extraction logic itself.
edges.hover_zh: 纯监控—惩罚均衡昂贵且脆弱：Sng 的叛乱门槛表明汲取会撞墙。持久的财政能力需要比强制更便宜的东西——列维的准自愿合规正是从汲取逻辑内部长出的对同意的需求。

edges.hover_en: Once commitment and compliance problems are solved, historical state capacity itself becomes a treatment variable. Dell's 1698 boundary RDD flips the course's dependent variable into an independent one and sets the identification benchmark for segment E.
edges.hover_zh: 承诺与合规问题一旦解决，历史国家能力本身就成为处理变量。Dell 的1698年边界断点回归把全课的因变量翻转为自变量，并为E段树立识别基准。

edges.hover_en: Circumscription and population pressure resist precise measurement, and reverse causality looms (is warfare cause or consequence of centralization?). Mayshar–Moav–Pascali restate exit-blocking as crop appropriability — cereals vs tubers — turning a qualitative constraint into a measurable, instrumentable variable.
edges.hover_zh: 环境限制与人口压力难以精确测量，且反向因果如影随形（战争是集权的因还是果？）。Mayshar–Moav–Pascali 把'逃逸受阻'重述为作物可占用性——谷物对块茎——将定性约束转化为可测量、可工具化的变量。

edges.hover_en: Allen converts the general circumscription thesis into a single-case economic mechanism: Nile geography made flight prohibitively costly, so cultivators could be taxed. Also the course template for puzzle construction — a quantified anomalous contrast, not a topic.
edges.hover_zh: Allen 把一般化的限制命题转化为单一案例的经济机制：尼罗河地理使逃亡代价高昂，耕作者因此可被征税。同时也是问题构建的模板——量化的反常对比，而非一个泛泛的话题。

edges.hover_en: Scott's grain-legibility narrative is interpretive and vulnerable to functionalist inference. Mayshar et al. formalize it and test it against cross-regional suitability data — the same idea moved from mechanism thickness toward identification.
edges.hover_zh: Scott 的谷物可读性叙事是解释性的，易受功能主义推断之讥。Mayshar 等将其形式化并以跨区域适宜性数据检验——同一思想从机制厚度走向识别。

edges.hover_en: Vikings shifting from raids to Danelaw settlement and regular taxation illustrate the roving-to-stationary transition. Still an illustration, selectively chosen — the epistemic gap between this and a test is the point.
edges.hover_zh: 维京人从劫掠转向丹麦法区定居与常规征税，例证了流寇到坐寇的转变。但这仍是选择性的例证——它与'检验'之间的认识论差距正是教学重点。

edges.hover_en: Verbal theory can argue both that prosperity invites predation and that it funds defense — both stories are self-consistent. Dal Bó et al. write the security-prosperity interaction as a derivable model, forcing concept precision and exposing hidden assumptions (risk neutrality, no discounting, settler-only investment...).
edges.hover_zh: 口头理论既能说繁荣招致掠夺、又能说繁荣供养防御——两种叙事都自洽。Dal Bó 等把安全—繁荣互动写成可推导模型，逼迫概念精确化并暴露隐藏假设（风险中性、无折现、仅定居者可投资……）。

edges.hover_en: Did states form because bandits settled or because communities needed canals and walls? River shifts in ancient Mesopotamia provide exogenous variation; gridded archaeological outcomes (administrative buildings, canals, tribute tablets) let the data adjudicate between the two ontologies of state origins.
edges.hover_zh: 国家形成是因为盗匪定居，还是因为共同体需要运河与城墙？古代两河的河道改道提供外生变异；网格化考古结果（行政建筑、运河、贡赋泥板）让数据在两种国家起源本体论之间做裁决。

edges.hover_en: Circumscription inverted and scaled up: fractured terrain blocks any single hegemon in Europe while China's open core rewards unification. Simulation on gridded geography turns static geographic determinism into a dynamic, parameterized model of state-system divergence.
edges.hover_zh: 限制论的反转与放大：碎裂地形使欧洲无法出现单一霸权，中国的开阔核心则奖励统一。网格地理上的模拟把静态地理决定论变成国家体系分流的动态参数化模型。

edges.hover_en: Answering decades of criticism (endogeneity, vague mechanisms) with data: a 1490–1790 territorial panel and cumulative war-gain variables that recover the positive-feedback dynamic Tilly narrated. Supports the paradigm.
edges.hover_zh: 以数据回应数十年批评（内生性、机制含混）：1490–1790领土面板与累积战争收益变量，复原 Tilly 叙述的正反馈动态。支持范式。

edges.hover_en: War builds fiscal capacity only after the Military Revolution made money decisive, and only where domestic cohesion made investment worthwhile. The bellicist claim survives — rewritten with interaction terms.
edges.hover_zh: 只有在军事革命使金钱决定胜负之后、且国内凝聚使投资值得之处，战争才建设财政能力。战争国家命题存活——但被改写为带交互项的形式。

edges.hover_en: The Tilly mechanism silently assumes war must be financed by domestic taxation. Once cheap external credit exists (1816–1913), rulers can fight without bargaining with taxpayers — mortgaging sovereignty instead of building institutions.
edges.hover_zh: Tilly 机制默认战争必须以国内税收融资。一旦廉价外债可得（1816–1913），统治者无需与纳税人议价即可作战——以典当主权替代建设制度。

edges.hover_en: Gridded evidence 1100–1790: territorial-state emergence tracks urban commercial geography far better than war pressure. A direct empirical challenge — and a measurement innovation (grid cells as units) with its own construct-validity questions.
edges.hover_zh: 1100–1790的网格证据：领土国家的兴起与城市商业地理的关联远强于战争压力。直接的经验反驳——同时也是带来自身构念效度问题的测量创新（以网格为分析单元）。

edges.hover_en: Europe's administrative and legal templates — chanceries, canon law, conciliar practice — were borrowed from the papacy centuries before sustained interstate war competition. The institutional genome of the state predates the bellicist mechanism.
edges.hover_zh: 欧洲的行政与法律模板——文书署、教会法、会议制——在持续的国家间战争竞争之前数百年就借自教廷。国家的制度基因早于战争创造国家机制。

edges.hover_en: Korea and Japan, 400–800 CE: centralized states built by emulating Tang institutions without hegemonic war pressure. Learning and prestige as an alternative causal pathway; also a caution against exporting European scope conditions.
edges.hover_zh: 公元400–800年的朝鲜与日本：无霸权战争压力下通过模仿唐制建成集权国家。学习与声望作为替代因果路径；也警示不要把欧洲的范围条件当作普遍前提输出。

edges.hover_en: From explaining which polities survive to theorizing the state system itself: borders as collusion among incumbent rulers to exclude entrants from the governance market. The unit of theory moves from state to cartel.
edges.hover_zh: 从解释哪些政体存活，到把国家体系本身理论化：边界是在位统治者共谋、把新进入者排除出治理市场的产物。理论单元从国家转向卡特尔。

edges.hover_en: Kiser takes q as given and explains contract choice. Sng makes q fall with distance from the capital, generating agent extortion, a rebellion-constrained low tax rate, and the 'paradox of development'. Class caveat: the concave payoff decomposition is a modeling sleight of hand built to rationalize a known pattern.
edges.hover_zh: Kiser 把 q 当作给定并解释合约选择；Sng 让 q 随距首都的距离下降，生成代理人勒索、受叛乱约束的低税率与'发展悖论'。课堂保留意见：凹函数支付分解是为合理化已知模式而设的建模巧手。

edges.hover_en: In Kiser and Sng, monitoring technology falls from the sky. Stasavage opens the door to endogenizing it: writing, surveying, and record-keeping are technologies governments can invest in — raising q and displacing council-based 'early democracy' with hierarchy.
edges.hover_zh: 在 Kiser 与 Sng 那里，监控技术从天而降。Stasavage 打开了内生化的大门：书写、测量、簿记是政府可以投资的技术——q 被抬高，议事会式的'早期民主'被科层等级取代。

edges.hover_en: Legibility finally gets exogenous variation: coltan is bulky and visible (high q — tax at the mine), gold is concealable (low q — tax consumption by penetrating village society). Commodity physics assigns the treatment; state functions follow.
edges.hover_zh: 可辨识性终于获得外生变异：钶钽矿笨重可见（高 q——在矿山设卡征税），黄金易于藏匿（低 q——渗透村社征收消费税）。矿产的物理属性分配了处理；国家功能随之而来。

edges.hover_en: From armed groups filling a governance vacuum to the vacuum itself as a structuring force: where the state is scarce, its rare touch reshapes local inequality and political power. Contemporary weak-state settings as laboratories for state-formation mechanisms.
edges.hover_zh: 从武装团体填补治理真空，到真空本身作为结构性力量：国家稀缺之处，其罕见的触碰重塑地方不平等与政治权力。当代弱国家场景成为国家形成机制的实验场。

edges.hover_en: Levi's three constraints can explain almost anything — the opposite of parsimony, as the class put it. North & Weingast carve one precise problem out of that raw material: a sequential commitment game where an institutional penalty P sustains the fiscal contract.
edges.hover_zh: Levi 的三大约束几乎什么都能解释——课堂语：简约性的反面。North & Weingast 从这块原材料中雕出一个精确问题：一个由制度惩罚 P 维持财政契约的序贯承诺博弈。

edges.hover_en: Where does the penalty come from, and why does it persist? P = f(alignment, monitoring): credible only when parliament is controlled by a coalition aligned with creditors and small enough scale makes collective vigilance feasible. Whig control, not the Glorious Revolution per se, moved interest rates.
edges.hover_zh: 惩罚从何而来、为何持续？P = f(利益一致性, 监控能力)：只有当议会由与债权人利益一致的联盟控制、且规模小到集体警戒可行时，惩罚才可信。移动利率的是辉格党的在位，而非光荣革命本身。

edges.hover_en: No quasi-voluntary compliance anywhere: governments feed sectors whose production is naturally taxable, and public goods flow because the tax base would otherwise die — not because citizens consented. A fiscal-contract look-alike built from pure legibility.
edges.hover_zh: 全程没有准自愿合规：政府喂养生产天然可税的部门，公共品的流向是因为税源否则会死亡——而非公民的同意。由纯粹可辨识性搭建的财政契约赝品。

edges.hover_en: Besley–Persson model fiscal capacity as a forward-looking investment. Cantoni–Mohr–Weigand observe that investment at the finest historical grain available: administrators and administrative buildings across 2,000+ Holy Roman Empire polities over four centuries.
edges.hover_zh: Besley–Persson 把财政能力建模为前瞻性投资。Cantoni–Mohr–Weigand 在可得的最细历史颗粒度上观察这种投资：四个世纪、2000多个神圣罗马帝国政体的行政官与行政建筑。

edges.hover_en: In Besley–Persson, war is a common-interest shock that spurs capacity investment. Queralt shows external credit supplies a substitute: why invest in extraction machinery when London will lend? The investment margin depends on the outside option.
edges.hover_zh: 在 Besley–Persson 那里，战争是促发能力投资的共同利益冲击。Queralt 表明外部信贷提供了替代品：伦敦愿意放贷时，何必投资汲取机器？投资边际取决于外部选项。

edges.hover_en: Two demonstrations that state capacity is decided by elite social structure: Song elites with geographically dispersed kin networks backed strengthening; postbellum Southern elites deliberately hollowed out bureaucracy to preserve racial hierarchy. Weak states can be built on purpose.
edges.hover_zh: 国家能力由精英社会结构决定的两个论证：宗族网络跨地域的宋代精英支持强化国家；内战后的南方精英刻意掏空官僚机构以维护种族等级。孱弱的国家可以是被有意建成的。

edges.hover_en: Grzymala-Busse narrates the church-state entanglement comparatively; the Bueno de Mesquitas write the Investiture Controversy as a bargaining model over who legitimates bishops, deriving testable implications for political authority and urban growth.
edges.hover_zh: Grzymala-Busse 以比较叙事呈现教俗纠缠；Bueno de Mesquita 父子把叙任权之争写成'谁授职主教'的议价模型，推导出关于政治权威与城市增长的可检验含义。

edges.hover_en: The church-state equilibrium struck after Worms is shattered by the Reformation: religious competition reallocates human capital, construction, and administrative talent from church to state. A shock to the justification layer with measurable material and organizational consequences.
edges.hover_zh: 沃尔姆斯协定后达成的教俗均衡被宗教改革击碎：宗教竞争把人力资本、建筑与行政人才从教会再配置到国家。证成层的冲击带来可测量的物质与组织后果。

edges.hover_en: Both regress today's outcomes on historical statehood, with opposite signs: Dell's village-level bureaucratic state crowds in cooperation and development; Hariri's early states blocked European institutional transplants and left autocracy. What mediates the legacy — local institutions or colonial encounter — decides its sign.
edges.hover_zh: 两者都用历史国家性回归当代结果，符号却相反：Dell 的村社官僚国家挤入合作与发展；Hariri 的早期国家抵御欧洲制度移植、留下威权遗产。中介遗产的是什么——地方制度还是殖民遭遇——决定其符号。

edges.hover_en: Extend state history to six millennia and the linear question dissolves into an inverted-U: both too little and too much accumulated statehood predict worse outcomes. Index construction (statehist) as both the innovation and the construct-validity risk.
edges.hover_zh: 把国家历史延伸到六千年，线性问题消解为倒U：国家历史太短与太长都预测更差的结果。指数构造（statehist）既是创新也是构念效度风险所在。

edges.hover_en: The methodological conscience of segment E: compression of centuries into one regressor, spatial autocorrelation inflating significance, mechanism black boxes, and apples-to-oranges outcome choices. Attach this audit to every persistence node, Dell included.
edges.hover_zh: E段的方法论良心：把数个世纪压缩成一个回归元、空间自相关虚增显著性、机制黑箱、'苹果比橘子'的结果选择。这份体检适用于每个持久性节点，包括 Dell。

edges.hover_en: Against static persistence: the effects of the 1790 departmental capitals unfold over time — short-run costs, long-run gains through administration and public goods. Consequences of state building are trajectories, not fixed treatment effects.
edges.hover_zh: 反对静态持久性：1790年省会设置的效应随时间展开——短期成本、经由行政与公共品的长期收益。国家建设的后果是轨迹，而非固定的处理效应。

edges.hover_en: The longest arc in the course: Scott coined legibility as a critical concept; D'Arcy–Nistotskaya–Olsson build it into a cadaster index (mapping × registration × coverage) and test each claimed channel separately. The full measurement loop — with Scott's warning that simplification flattens local knowledge now applying to the index itself.
edges.hover_zh: 全课最长的一条弧线：Scott 把可读性铸造为批判性概念；D'Arcy–Nistotskaya–Olsson 把它做成地籍指数（测绘×登记×覆盖）并逐一检验其声称的机制。完整的测量闭环——而 Scott 关于简化会压扁地方知识的警告，如今同样适用于这个指数本身。

edges.hover_en: The seam between the extraction logic and the justification layer: Levi's quasi-voluntary compliance is legitimacy in functional form (fairness beliefs sustaining payment), while the Investiture literature treats legitimation as a resource fought over. Two low-spec and full-spec versions of the same layer.
edges.hover_zh: 汲取逻辑与证成层之间的缝合线：Levi 的准自愿合规是功能形态的合法性（公平感维系纳税），而叙任权文献把合法性当作被争夺的资源。同一层的低配版本与完整版本。

edges.hover_en: Compliance can be incentivized (Levi) — or manufactured upstream. Paglayan shows states responding to internal disorder by building mass schooling to produce obedient subjects in childhood: direct state investment in the belief layer, the course's clearest empirical entry into justification.
edges.hover_zh: 合规可以被激励（Levi）——也可以在上游被生产。Paglayan 表明国家以建设大众学校教育回应内部失序，在童年期生产服从的臣民：国家对信念层的直接投资，本课进入证成层最清晰的经验入口。

edges.hover_en: Sng's ruler fears crossing threshold r and keeps taxes low; Albertus & Gay show state penetration itself — the horse-post network — triggering rebellion. The constraint is not a fixed parameter but a feedback loop: building the state provokes the resistance that constrains it.
edges.hover_zh: Sng 的统治者惧怕越过门槛 r 而维持低税；Albertus & Gay 表明国家渗透本身——驿站网络——就会触发叛乱。约束不是固定参数而是反馈回路：建设国家激起制约国家的抵抗。

edges.hover_en: Grzymala-Busse borrows Abramson's shapefiles and state-coding standard (taxation capacity + common executive). Hard evidence that the methodological axis exists: measurement infrastructure built by one project becomes the substrate of the next — carrying its coding choices, and their validity risks, forward.
edges.hover_zh: Grzymala-Busse 直接借用 Abramson 的 shapefile 与国家性编码标准（能征税+有共同行政长官）。方法论轴存在的硬证据：一个项目建成的测量基础设施成为下一个项目的底座——其编码选择及效度风险也随之延续。

edges.hover_en: Tilly operationalizes the Weberian definition historically: how organizations that monopolize coercion over territory actually came into being in Europe.
edges.hover_zh: Tilly 将韦伯式定义历史化：在领土上垄断强制的组织在欧洲究竟如何生成。

edges.hover_en: Kiser positions principal-agent theory against Weber's bureaucracy — but, as the class noted, his treatment of Weber (and Williamson, North) verges on strawman; the strongest rival he dispatches is the practitioners' 'predictability' account.
edges.hover_zh: Kiser 以委托-代理理论对垒韦伯的官僚制——但如课堂所指，他对韦伯（以及 Williamson、North）的处理近乎稻草人；他真正有力驳倒的对手是实践者视角的'可预测性'解释。

class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_zh: 正式模型的两种用途（内部一致性检查 vs 发现非显而易见的可观察含义）与学科社会学第三用途；回归表堆叠作为同行评审均衡；legibility 的测量难题；执行力作为范围条件
class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_en: Two legitimate uses of formal models (consistency check vs non-obvious observable implications) plus the sociological third; stacked regression tables as a peer-review equilibrium; the measurement problem of legibility; enforcement as a scope condition

class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_zh: 12点批判性对话：补充与挑战的区分格式；混淆地理规模与制度设计；叛乱门槛 r 的内生性；代理人的多维性（胥吏双重角色）
class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_en: 12-point critical engagement in supplement-vs-challenge format; confounding geographic size with institutional design; endogeneity of the rebellion threshold r; multidimensional agents (the clerks' dual role)

class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_zh: 简约性与'什么都能解释'的框架；承诺博弈的逆向归纳与重复博弈解；准自愿合规的协调博弈形式化；illustration vs test 在 Levi 案例章中的体现
class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_en: Parsimony and explain-anything frameworks; backward induction and repeated-game solutions to the commitment game; a coordination-game formalization of quasi-voluntary compliance; illustration vs test in Levi's case chapters

class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_zh: （Claude Code 请从 assets/state_formation_sources/ 读取此文件，内容归入 methodology 页面；本 spec 拟定时该文件读取失败）
class_notes_files.methodology_page_topics_en: (Claude Code: read this file from assets/state_formation_sources/ and fold it into the methodology page; it was unreadable when this spec was drafted)
